publicShare.title: Share link
publicShare.description: Create a read-only share URL. Anyone with the link can view it without signing in.
publicShare.unavailableDescription: The link may be invalid or the share has been removed.

auth.name: Name
auth.setupDescription: Create your admin account to get started

login.heroDescription: Keep your schedule at the center, with notes and todos in the same place. Ask AI to find, organize, and add things for you.
login.featureMemos: Keep schedules, notes, todos, and links in one place
login.featureTodos: Use the right UI for each kind of information without splitting tools
login.featureCalendar: Let AI check your schedule, search, organize, and add things
login.featureSearch: Find things later without remembering where you put them

appError.title: This screen failed to load
appError.description: A page update or chunk load likely interrupted the current view. Reload the app or go back home.

settings.title: Settings
settings.sponsorDescription: Unlock API keys, CLI access, and AI chat with the paid Pro plan.
settings.upgradeFeatureChat: AI Assistant — just ask "What's on my schedule tomorrow?"
settings.upgradeFeatureImage: Image attachments — save photos and screenshots to your memos
settings.upgradeFeatureApi: App integrations — connect with your favorite tools
settings.upgradeEmailNote: Billing details, cancellation terms, and refund policy are available on the konbu website before purchase.
settings.checkoutUnavailable: Billing is not configured yet. Please use the pricing page.
settings.apiKeysSponsorOnly: API keys are available on the Pro plan. Upgrade to Pro to unlock CLI and AI integrations.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
settings.icalDescription: Add to Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or other apps
settings.icalReadOnly: This URL is read-only and separate from your API key.
settings.icalReady: A new iCal URL is ready.
settings.icalActiveHidden: A feed token is active. Regenerate to reveal and copy a new URL.
settings.icalNotGenerated: No iCal URL has been generated yet.

help.title: Help
help.description: Learn how to use konbu — your personal workspace for schedules, notes, tasks, and links.
help.githubFooter: For CLI usage, keyboard shortcuts, and self-hosting details, see the

memos.title: Memos
memos.description: Write and organize notes in Markdown. Each memo can have tags for easy filtering.
tips: Use Markdown syntax for headings, lists, code blocks, and more
Add tags to organize memos — filter by tag on the memo list
Switch to Table type to use a spreadsheet-style memo
Share a memo publicly via the Share button

todos.title: ToDo
todos.description: Manage tasks with status tracking and due dates. Quick-add from the input bar at the top.
tips: Type a task and press Enter to add it instantly
Use !today, !tomorrow, or !nextweek to set a due date inline
Add tags with #tag directly in the input
Add notes to any task for extra context
Click the checkbox to mark as done — completed tasks are hidden by default

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: View and manage your schedule in month, week, or list view. Supports all-day and timed events.
tips: Click a day to quickly add an event
Set recurrence rules for repeating events (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly)
Create multiple calendars and assign colors to each
Share a calendar with others via invitation link
Import events from .ics files in Settings > Data

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Save and organize your frequently used links and web tools. Think of it as a bookmark launcher.
tips: Add a name, URL, and optional category to create a tool
Tools are grouped by category for quick access
Favicons are fetched automatically
Use Health Check to verify which links are still reachable

search.title: Search
search.description: Find anything across memos, todos, events, and tools from one place.
tips: Press Ctrl+K (or Cmd+K) anywhere to open quick search
The Search page provides filters by type, tag, and date range
Results are ranked by relevance using fuzzy matching

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.description: Talk to an AI assistant that knows your workspace. Ask it to find, summarize, or add things for you.
tips: Ask questions like "What's on my schedule tomorrow?" or "Find my notes about..."
The assistant can create memos, todos, and events on your behalf
Requires a Pro plan or your own LLM API key (set in Settings > AI)

general.title: Tips & Common Operations
general.description: Useful features that work across the app.
tips: Tags are shared across memos, todos, and calendar events
Export all your data as JSON or Markdown ZIP from Settings > Data
Import calendar events from .ics files
Share individual memos publicly with a unique URL
Switch between themes in Settings > Appearance, including Colorful mode

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Send bugs, feature requests, or contact directly from here.
feedback.formDescription: We read bug reports, ideas, and questions here.
feedback.homeTitle: Found a bug or want to shape konbu?
feedback.homeDescription: Send a structured report or request directly from the app.
feedback.guideDescription: Use the category that best matches your intent.
feedback.guideBug: Bug reports should include how to reproduce it, what you expected, and what actually happened.
feedback.guideFeature: Feature requests should describe the current problem first, then the change you want.
feedback.guideResponse: If the topic is sensitive, keep the message brief. A sanitized copy may be sent to GitHub Issues.
feedback.privacy: A sanitized copy may be forwarded to GitHub Issues. Avoid including private details, credentials, or contact information in the message body.
feedback.validation: Please fill in the required fields for this category.
feedback.placeholder: What happened, what you expected, or what you want to add.
feedback.thanks: Thanks. Your feedback has been received.

categoryHints.question: Ask about product behavior or usage
